basics.name: Waldo Ibarra
basics.label: Full Stack Engineer | Software Architect
basics.summary: Software professional with 11+ years of experience building projects. I strive for doing so following best practices, design principles and architectures like Clean Code, Clean Architecture, SOLID, BDD, TDD, DDD.

work.summary: Automated the way feed templates were generated with an UI editor.
Designed, architected and built SaaS APIs for gift cards and balances management.
I used AI to show user-specific recommendations based on interactions with items.
highlights: Standardized Event Storming and C4 model techniques for architecture design and documentation.
Wrote Clean Code and refactored Legacy Code following TDD and SOLID principles.
Mentored engineers about Clean Code principles.
Automated SDLC using CI/CD pipelines and IaC tools.
Automated migration of recommendation system resources with a Shell script.

work.position: Software Architect | Technical Lead | Founding Engineer
work.summary: Designed, architected and built a SaaS API while guiding a team of around 55 engineers, tech leads and architects.
highlights: Led talks with engineering teams on how to diagram and document architectures using C4 model; How to have a clean code / architecture / workflow by using design patterns, architecture patterns and DevOps practices.
Technically inverviewed engineers and architects to build a team up to ~60 people.
Stabilized existing MVP using design patterns, monitoring the system health with alerts and deploying the monolith to AWS with a pipeline.

work.summary: Refactored code base to be modular and shipped new features for a Facebook messenger chat bot that had an embedded React minigame as part of the conversation flow.
Develop in a product for B2B payments, providing AR and AP features.
highlights: Migrated parts of a monolith to a microservice arquitecture.
Created PCI compliant script to import payers bank/card payment information from Authorize.net.
Implemented and optimized a multi-schema search with Elasticsearch.

work.summary: Built a microservice to optimize their web product search, reducing its search time by more than 90%.

As part of the architecture team was responsible to guide development teams to comply with the company standards. Evaluate and implement security on a variety of internal APIs. Automate processes developing Bash scripts, Node.js CLIs and Jenkins. Design and develop high performance APIs using Node.js.
highlights: Lead POCs projects for new technologies, such as CA API Gateway, RedHat OpenShift, Docker, Jenkins.
Designed and implemented a real-time synchronization system (a Node.js ETL) between MongoDB and MSSQL databases using SQL triggers and web sockets.
Developed internal tools used by multiple teams.

work.summary: Developed microservices on Node.js, mail delivery, push notifications (FCM), download and update center for desktop applications (nuts), cron task scheduling. Maintenance of a web ERP built on Marionette and C# with EF. Maintenance of desktop applications made with electron and WPF.
highlights: Direct contact with customer to manage and implement integrations with other ERPs.
Real-time data synchronization of entities (bi-directional) between the in-house web ERP and SAP B1 through a Node.js microservice.
Reduced deployment time by 95% by implementing CI/CD with Gulp and GitHub webhooks.
Implemented Peru's electronic invoice with SUNAT on their web ERP.

work.summary: Shipped features and maintained a web ERP built with VB.NET and JQuery.
highlights: Lead project development to visually live edit sections of a web ERP using JQuery.
Integrated internal services into a VB.NET monolith.
Performed and documented testing.

education.summary: I invest time learning about anything that pokes my curiosity, specially software. ❤️ Learning mostly by reading documentation, books, newsletters, conferences; Also by using platforms like Udemy, A Cloud Guru and CodelyTV.
